languages.text: "Возникли подозрения о ереси укрывательства священной десятины, поэтому была инициирована экстренная инспекция. Пока инспекция не подойдет к концу, десятина будет находиться в ведении Администратума — приблизительный срок составляет 145 планетарных, 17 суточных циклов и 2 полных оборота по хроноисчислению Даргонуса".

"Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."
languages.original_text: "Возникли подозрения о ереси укрывательства священной десятины, поэтому была инициирована экстренная инспекция. Пока инспекция не подойдет к концу, десятина будет находиться в ведении Администратума — приблизительный срок составляет 143 года, 17 дней, 2 часа и 3 минуты по летоисчислению Даргонуса".

languages.text: "Aufgrund des dringenden Verdachtes der Unterschlagung des heiligen Zehnts wurde eine dringliche Untersuchung wegen Ketzerei angestrengt. Bis zum Abschluss besagter Untersuchung bleibt der Zehnt im Gewahrsam des Administratums. Geschätzte Verwahrungszeit: 143 Dargonusjahre, 17 Tage, 2 Stunden und 3 Minuten."
languages.original_text: "Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."

traits.locale_text: "Aufgrund des dringenden Verdachtes der Unterschlagung des heiligen Zehnts wurde eine dringliche Untersuchung wegen Ketzerei angestrengt. Bis zum Abschluss besagter Untersuchung bleibt der Zehnt im Gewahrsam des Administratums. Geschätzte Verwahrungszeit: 143 Dargonusjahre, 17 Tage, 2 Stunden und 3 Minuten."

languages.text: « Nous avons dû procéder à une inspection d'urgence en raison de récents soupçons concernant l'appropriation hérétique de la dîme sacrée. Tant que cette procédure ne sera pas terminée, la dîme restera sous la garde de l'Administratum. Durée estimée de la séquestre : 143 années de Dargonus, 17 jours, 2 heures et 3 minutes. »
languages.original_text: "Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons dû procéder à une inspection d'urgence en raison de récents soupçons concernant l'appropriation hérétique de la dîme sacrée. Tant que cette procédure ne sera pas terminée, la dîme restera sous la garde de l'Administratum. Durée estimée de la séquestre : 143 années de Dargonus, 17 jours, 2 heures et 3 minutes. »

languages.text: “我们怀疑异端分子挪用了神圣的什一税，目前正在进行紧急检查。在检查正式结束前，什一税将由内政部负责保管。预计扣押时间：143达戈努斯年17天2小时3分钟。”
languages.original_text: "Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."

traits.locale_text: “我们怀疑异端分子挪用了神圣的什一税，目前正在进行紧急检查。在检查正式结束前，什一税将由内政部负责保管。预计扣押时间：143达戈努斯年17天2小时3分钟。”

languages.text: «Debido a las sospechas de herejía por apropiación del sagrado diezmo, se ha iniciado una inspección de emergencia. Hasta que termine la inspección, el diezmo permanecerá bajo custodia del Administratum. Tiempo estimado de la retención: 143 años de Dargonus, 17 días, 2 horas y 3 minutos».
languages.original_text: "Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."

traits.locale_text: «Debido a las sospechas de herejía por apropiación del sagrado diezmo, se ha iniciado una inspección de emergencia. Hasta que termine la inspección, el diezmo permanecerá bajo custodia del Administratum. Tiempo estimado de la retención: 143 años de Dargonus, 17 días, 2 horas y 3 minutos».

languages.text: 「最近、聖なる租税を横領した異端の疑いがあるため、緊急検査が開始されました。検査が完了するまで、租税は帝国行政局に保管されます。推定保管期間143ダルゴナス年、17日、2時間、3分」
languages.original_text: "Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."

traits.locale_text: 「最近、聖なる租税を横領した異端の疑いがあるため、緊急検査が開始されました。検査が完了するまで、租税は帝国行政局に保管されます。推定保管期間143ダルゴナス年、17日、2時間、3分」

languages.text: "Kutsal aşarın zimmete geçirilmesini amaçlayan bir kâfirliğe yönelik şüpheler nedeniyle acil bir teftiş başlatılmış bulunuyor. Söz konusu teftiş tamamlanana kadar aşar, Administratum'un nezaretinde kalacak. Tahminî alıkoyma süresi: 143 Dargonus yılı, 17 gün, 2 saat ve 3 dakika."
languages.original_text: "Due to recent suspicions of the heresy of appropriating the sacred tithe, an emergency inspection has been initiated. Until said inspection is complete, the tithe will remain in the custody of the Administratum. Estimated retainment period: 143 Dargonus years, 17 days, 2 hours, and 3 minutes."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal aşarın zimmete geçirilmesini amaçlayan bir sapkınlık hakkında yakın zamanda duyulan şüpheler nedeniyle acil bir teftiş başlatılmıştır. Söz konusu teftiş tamamlanana kadar aşar, Administratum'un nezaretinde kalacaktır. Tahminî alıkoyma süresi: 143 Dargonus yılı, 17 gün, 2 saat ve 3 dakika."
